text:
Major developments — March 15
The sound of huge explosions rocked Tehran and others were heard north and south of the city, and a large plume of smoke is rising in the direction of the city’s landmark Milad Tower, according to four residents. Two described the sounds as terrifying loud, and one compared them to an earthquake.
In Beirut, the Lebanese capital, the sound of airstrikes and thunder mingled indistinguishably in the first hour of Monday morning. The Israeli military said just a short while ago that it was targeting Hezbollah infrastructure but issued no advance evacuation warning. On Sunday, there were at least 40 Israeli airstrikes in parts of southern Lebanon.
title: Iran War Live Updates: ‘No Guarantees’ Oil Prices Drop Soon, U.S. Official Says
